description_long: This object is a crumpled, loosely wrapped package resembling a garbage bag or discarded food wrapper, primarily made of thin, semi-translucent white paper with colored bands and a printed logo. The paper is wrinkled and uneven, suggesting it has been handled or discarded, and the shape is irregular, with bulges and folds indicating it contains lightweight, soft material or air. The exterior features a prominent yellow circular logo with text, and there are green, yellow, and black color bands around the lower edges. The bag appears to be sealed or closed at the bottom, with no visible opening or tie, and the contents are not visible through the material. The overall size is small, similar to a fast-food sandwich wrapper, and it is likely to be found as street trash in an urban environment.
description: A crumpled, loosely wrapped paper garbage bag or food wrapper with a yellow logo and colored bands, showing signs of handling and discard. The bag is irregularly shaped, opaque, and appears lightweight.
description_view_0: The front view shows the most prominent yellow logo and a visible yellow band at the base, with the paper crumpled and slightly open at the bottom edge.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the green band on the lower right and less of the logo, with the paper appearing more tightly crumpled.
description_view_2: The back view displays the green band more fully and the yellow logo partially, with the paper surface showing pronounced wrinkles and bulges.
description_view_3: This angled view shows the logo at an oblique angle, with the paper gathered and folded at the right edge, and a mix of yellow and green bands visible.
attribute_fullness_or_bulging: moderately full with visible bulges and loose, uneven surface tension
